{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Naraka guards
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|There are [[Naraka guards]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
